WidgetDisplayUnit.description:
Linear conversion applied when displaying a slider's value.

Displayed = stored * scale + offset, formatted to ``precision`` decimal
digits, suffixed with ``unit``. The stored/wire value is unchanged — the
transform is presentational only.
WidgetDisplayUnit.title: WidgetDisplayUnit

WorkflowVideoAudioRetakeRule.description:
Derived widget that exposes a 3-option retake-mode enum.

The selected mode drives two boolean bypass widgets: setting ``video_bypass``
replaces the video retake mask with a solid pass-through mask, and likewise
for ``audio_bypass``. Selecting "both" leaves both masks untouched.
WorkflowVideoAudioRetakeRule.title: WorkflowVideoAudioRetakeRule
